name: Percival De Rolo
description:
Percy was born in Whitestone, where his branch of the de Rolo family ruled, and was raised alongside his six siblings. Five years before the campaign began, his family hosted guests: the Briarwoods. The couple initiated a coup and seized control of Whitestone, murdering the entire de Rolo Family and those loyal to them. Percy was taken prisoner and tortured by Dr. Anna Ripley, one of the Briarwoods' allies. Percy's youngest sister and only surviving family, Cassandra, managed to free him, and they attempted to flee Whitestone together. However, she was hit by several arrows in their escape, and Percy fled on his own, believing her to be dead.[40] His hair went white while he was unconscious in the river.

Percy wandered for about two years, briefly working as a saddlemaker and several months working at a stable outside Stilben and other odd jobs. Percy served on a fishing boat, the Cold Comfort, for about a year and didn't talk much at the time with the crew. One night, he had a dream in which a smoke-like entity offered him the means to get revenge for his family. Percy then constructed his first gun, the List. Percy then tracked Dr. Ripley for a year until he finally found her, but he was captured by her guards and imprisoned in a jail cell.
creator: LavenderRibbon
